issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive effect during turn), not 'Activated' (player-initiated). Text '[Your Turn]' indicates a passive ongoing effect.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Text '[Your Turn]' explicitly requires duration restriction to your turn only, per DSL rules.
Condition should be 'HasCardOnBoard' with count/type filter for '3 or more Minks type Characters', not 'Always'. Current condition ignores the 3+ Minks requirement.
Condition type should be 'LeaderHasType' (checking Leader type), not 'HasCardOnBoard'. Current condition checks board presence instead of Leader type.
When using 'LeaderHasType', condition should have 'type' field (e.g., 'type': 'Minks'), not 'name'. Adjust field key for Leader type checks.
